---
title: "Notebook: Feldman-Cousins Intervals"
lang: en
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: lualatex
jupyter: python3
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

This is still a numerical placeholder for the unified-interval chapter.

## Draft table

```{python}
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

n_obs = np.arange(0, 6)
proxy_limit = n_obs + 1.64 * np.sqrt(n_obs + 1)

pd.DataFrame({
    "observed counts": n_obs,
    "draft upper guide": proxy_limit,
})
```
